description.en: Papua New Guinea is a tropical island country in the South Pacific, known for its extraordinary biodiversity and over 800 languages.

fun_fact.de: In Papua-Neuguinea werden über 800 verschiedene Sprachen gesprochen – mehr als in jedem anderen Land der Welt!
fun_fact.en: Over 800 different languages are spoken in Papua New Guinea – more than any other country in the world!
